reviews.标题: Skip this EXTREMELY low quality filament, bed ahesion failures
reviews.评论: This filament is actual garbage. It‘s the first filament I‘ve found that won‘t adhere to the textured P1S plate. I suspect it‘s just super cheap and low quality. This isn‘t worth ANY amount of money because it straight-up doesn‘t work.

Halfway through a massive print, filament overlap, tangled on the roll under the first couple layers. Not cool, no quality control. I shouldn’t have to re-spool every role I buy. This brand is not alone in this issue.
My roll was very brittle and kept breaking.

Usually have no issues with sunlu but relieved this roll and 1st thing i noticed was how poorly the filament was rolled. Tried putting it in my ams and it kept biding up and causing errors in the ams and printer. I emailed sunlu the day it was delivered and still no response from them. The whole roll is like this in the video provided. Idk if I will be ordering aagain.
This film does not print good at all. Kept clogging up my machine.

reviews.标题: Filament end was buried and hard to locate
reviews.评论: The product was cleanly packaged, with the filament evenly and tightly wrapped, marred only by the end of the filament being pushed down the inside of the spool, with the looser turn of filament being some distance from the end of the filament, requiring me to pull about thirty feet of filament off the spool before I found the end, and then spend a half hour untangling the rat‘s-nest of turns to get the filament wound back onto the spool so it could be used without cutting it all off. Having a more visible tab indicating where the end of the filament was would have been much better
Can‘t get a reliable print without swapping out rolls. So far 3 of the 4 rolls have self tangled and have caused failures
Filamento muy bueno pero los carretes me llagaron rotos y totalmente inservibles.

All prints have failed with this, zero issues with any other filament I have used. The supports wind up curling up and throws the whole thing off. Doesn‘t stick to the base and looks messy. Will not buy again.

reviews.标题: Don’t be cheap buy a better one.
reviews.评论: The filament quality is ok enough. Spool Is incredibly tangled on itself causing it to stop printing, terrible. Just spend the extra few dollars on a better brand.
Filament got brittle and stuck to itself.  It didn‘t feed properly halfway through the roll.

All it does is clog. I‘ve tried everything including trying another spool and there‘s no fixing it I swapped to my usual filament and it works fine. Idk if its the batch but I won‘t be using sunlu again.

reviews.标题: Resealed return filament! Beware and inspect every order immediately out of the box
reviews.评论: Beware of returned filament. If you receive a package that appears not vacuum sealed, return it immediately! I ordered 1k filament and got roughly 250g lol. Can clearly see it’s been resealed!Waited over a week to get this to try and complete a print but nope, can’t now! Other Sunlu items has been great but very disappointing on this particular order.

reviews.标题: Prints nice but not really that pigmented.
reviews.评论: Got through this entire spool before writing. Has a lovely print quality but only if it‘s the only color being used. Don‘t bother using this in multicolor prints especially if it‘s being paired with a darker color. It‘s translucent as heck. Even after 5 solid layers you can see whatever is behind it. Tried increasing the amount of layers. Tried increasing the amount of walls but if there is any other color around it,  you will see that color through it.Any of the prints I‘ve done with it as the only color have come out great but I needed something that I could use alongside black and this just ain‘t it.

I’m not one to write reviews trashing products but this filament keeps letting me down in new ways. I have a Bambu A1 and I have never had an issue with any other filament of any material. I have even purchased this filament in white about a year ago and it performed well, no complaints. This latest batch however, I purchased in black (no idea if that would have any effect or if it’s across the entire product line), and it has been nothing but problems.It has incredibly poor bed adhesion (PEI Textured plate), no matter how clean the plate is. Every single part I print requires a brim, and I’ve never had to do that for even the most miniscule footprint parts. Adjusting bed temps in either direction seems to have no effect. The spool also came poorly wound and very tangled and it causes constant issues with jamming up during printing. It also oozes/strings a bunch which is not something I’ve ever experienced outside of foaming LWPLA which is obviously designed to do that. I’ve played with temps some trying to mitigate this, to little effect, but I also don’t care to spend the effort fine tuning for a subpar product. As I said, I’ve never had a single issue with any other filament with my usual settings.To be fair, if I can manage to get through a print without major issues, the quality comes out fine, but that’s like a 1 in 3 occasion. Pic attached is of a section of nacelle on a model plane I’m printing.

My most recent order, November 2025, included blue, black, beige, and white.  All 4 colors have had inadequate winding and caused feeding issues.  Some spools would kink up and would need cut.  Others would just overlap on the spool and seize.I am steering clear of future Sunlu purchases because of this.  Other less expensive filaments have not had this issue.I will say when the spools worked as intended, the prints were good.

I‘m generally pretty happy with the print quality of the filament I get from SUNLU, however every now and then I get a spool that is completely tangled. Out of the 13 spools I‘ve ordered, 3 of them had tangling issues and 2 required me to cut the filament mid-print to sort it out. If I wasn‘t paying attention to the print, my printer would‘ve just remained paused because of the jam. I‘m very careful with the handling of the spools, these were straight from the box onto the AMS Lite. Maybe I just have bad luck, but that‘s a 23% failure rate in QC from my perspective.
It looks blue not turquoise but prints really well in machine.

Spool is too wide for Bambu AMS. The blue “reusable” spool doesn’t fit in the ams so the rollers don’t grip it. I didn’t realize at first until I was 4 hours into the print before it got to the Sunlu red. I would have returned it but didn’t want to wait days for another red to show up so I hand spooled a lot of it onto an empty Bambu spool.

I would not buy this filament. It is wrapped very tightly and the spools of it I got were in knots. This caused the filament to pull itself out of the extruder on my printer, mid-print cycle, several times. I‘d recommend spending the extra couple bucks for filament from a more reliable company, that will sell you spools of filament that you don‘t have to work on in order to use.
This PLA+ is great. Iver printed several spools of it and its pretty much all i buy. No breaks, kinks, etc. always prints well and the packaging is always solid.
Plastic was completely tangled on the spool, causing failed prints and making the entire spool unusable. Have purchased many simply filament, but was greatly disappointed in the quality of these

reviews.标题: Color is too bright, layer adhesion sucks
reviews.评论: This is not a PLA+ 2.0 more like a 0.5This is basically regular PLA but somehow less layer adhesion.It printed nice though so there is that.

reviews.标题: The bad spool wind keeps over-straining the AMS and stopping the print
reviews.评论: I think this is a really great material, but for three spools now I‘ve had it jam up due to a poor winding process where it jams the AMS and it stops the print. It gets so tight due to overlap that it‘s hard to separate. Serious pain to deal with.
Cannot say anything about the filament, package was missing yellow and magenta.

Was always breaking after unloading from a AMS/MMU, never broke inside bit as soon as I would eject it would snap off.  Plus no mater what I did I always got stringing, turn around and run a different filament and not touch one setting. And bam good print... But here is something also, not there in no sunlu branding I n this spool it did come in a sunlu box..... Al in all I would not get this color..

reviews.评论产品的属性: Color=8*250g New Color - Black+white+grey+red+klein Blue+yellow+green+sunny Orange;Size=2KG
reviews.评论: PLA filament keeps breaking as it goes through the tube when printing
Great filament, prints mostly flawless. But what‘s the point of refillable spools if you can‘t buy refills? Pretty sure the spool is half the cost. Let us buy refills.

In the middle of my 14 hrs print there is dark filament instead of white… it ruined my print which takes 0.5 kg of filament. Money and time waisted. I am very sad… and my client is waiting for her order by tomorrow morning. I have no time to reprint and no white filament at the moment. Have to order different brand now. No trust in sunlu after this.

reviews.标题: Doesn‘t live up to the hype
reviews.评论: It definitely does not print better than Bambu Lab PLA Basic. I‘ve used this Filament on my X1C and P1S and the same results of not reliably printing. I printed many items and the filament just is not consistent. If you want cheap, then this is right up your alley.

reviews.标题: Great filament when it‘s not twisted.
reviews.评论: This was the 2nd PLA+2.0 filament that has gotten twisted in Midnight Black at the end of my print. New roll. Used it until the end and then there was a knot.

I have used several brands of pla, pla+ and petg. I was very happy with sunlu for several months, the last two orders of filament have been terrible. The filament snaps off on the spool and in the tubes. Ever since they switched to the blue spools i have had to throw away several lengths EVERY time i use their product. It started as only the grey and black colors and now i have it with the rest. Its added hours to prints due to feed issues, ive had to remove the tubes to fish it out so many times my mini printer is worn out and i have to change the feed insert. Unfortunately i have over a dozen rolls left of varied colors that i cant justify just throwing it away. Id be very conservative if you are buying their products and try to limit it to only single rolls and only if you cant get it from anyone else. I will very likely never buy from them again.
Got tangled up in my second print of a new roll and had to manually unroll it and straighten it back up. First issue I‘ve had with sunlu
I am shocked at how horrifically these filaments are wound. Shame on yall Sunlu

I ordered a 4 pack of this pla+ in black for a large project (56“  ship model) totaling about 70 hours of which 4 parts were 12hours each. This pla really has adhesion issues. Unlike any pla I‘ve ran in the past....two prints even warped. I chased leveling and filament variables for hours. The prints were salvageable due to the nature of the project but still warping pla? The finish is very nice with no stringing or artifacts but you can tell the adhesion just isn‘t there. It did come on nice reels and was spooled properly but i will not buy this again. Beware.
Came in Decent speed, advertised as 4KG, though according to their own packaging and my personal weighing, the actual mass of filament is only ~3.2 kg, as each spool has only 800 Grams or so
This stuff is trash.  If you know filament you‘ll know it‘s trash just get something else.
3 of 4 filament bags where not vacume sealed.  Not knowing how long this bundle has been on the shelf I am not sure how much moisture this bundle absorbed.  Will give another try.

Be careful I think these spools were manufactured incorrectly because if you look at my picture, they’re showing only 800 g when they should be 1 kg but after opening up a package taking the filament off the spool and weighing the filament, it is 1 kg so these were special sets of filament my guess is that they have Improperly manufactured spools that are showing the wrong amount. The spools are physically larger than a standard sunlu spool  I have their reusable spools which are 195 mm in diameter and these are 200mm. So not sure what’s going on but I guarantee a lot of people are gonna be thinking they got ripped off so just be careful weigh the filament off the spool

Use to be good budget filament but seems quality has dropped drastically. It wants to tangle and get stuck as if is unwinding on the spool. Also seems to clog easily, although this could be due to the tangling issue. I would pay the slight premium and just go with elegoo or something of similar quality

reviews.标题: Overture the worst filament I‘ve ever used
reviews.评论: Bought this is metallic Grey for my bambu lab a1 and I have never had any issues with bed adhesion until I used this filament and it nearly destroyed my nozzle. The color was all wrong when printed it looked more bluish grey and while using this filament my failure rate went from 0% using bambu labs filament to 75% due to adhesion issues. Will not recommend to anyone. Cleaned my base plate as through as I could.
On a flashforge ad5x haven‘t had one usable part out of the role. Tried different nozzle temps from 195 to 230 no use dried the role same problems just not worth the money
Tangled on the first print.

reviews.标题: Filament seems good but not wound properly
reviews.评论: Roll is constantly snagging on my A1 meaning it was badly wound.

reviews.标题: Time is precious, don‘t waste it with this filament
reviews.评论: Terribly problematic and inconsistent. I‘ve tried different settings and each time I think I have it down, there are clogs or pops or adhesion problems. I‘ve run different filament with the exact same settings and had consistently normal outcomes even with Amazon house brand but every time I try this stuff out it fails. So much wasted time!!!
It didn’t work like I wanted in my A1

reviews.标题: Multiple issues interrupting the work, don‘t recommend
reviews.评论: It tangles and also some layers got sticked to each other so not feeding filament to the printer anymore, and ruining the work. Had to babysit it while it was printing all the time. Don‘t recommend
Wound up horribly and has snapped twice already. I shouldn‘t have to completely unwind this and then wind it up properly. Returning
This is the worst filament. It constantly gets tangled within itself and breaks.Having to completely unspool and respool is ridiculous.
I tried THREE TIMES TO GET ONE PRINT RIGHT. The adhesion is horrible, many supports just plopped off. This could be user error, but, hey, can‘t be too safe. Other colors work great, just not black.

reviews.标题: Terrible Bed Adhesion With Black 1kg Spool
reviews.评论: I bought the 1kg black PLA, and I was having terrible problems with adhesion. I dried, cleaned the bed, tweaked parameters, and still major bed adhesion issues. Later I printed a build with multiple colors in PLA and noticed and exclusively this black overture PLA was having failed adhesions whereas other PLA colors were fine. So I‘m pretty sure now that the issue was the filament.

reviews.标题: Had to throw away the entire roll!!!!
reviews.评论: I have used many rolls of overture play before. I have never experienced a roll this tangled in my life. Absolutely awful. I had to “fix“ this same roll over a dozen times before I had to give up and replace it with another brand. I complete roll down the drain because it is wound so poorly.

reviews.标题: Snagged multiple times on a single spool.
reviews.评论: Works, until it tangles and your print gets ruined. Bound up around 75% used. Disappointing. Quality is decent, but maybe QC needs work.Edit: Found a second snag. Never seen such bad quality control on a PLA spool.

reviews.标题: If you value your time, look elsewhere...
reviews.评论: I have had a terrible time with this filament. It has clogged my nozzle, broken several times, it will not stick to the be, finally it drips all over. I have spent three weeks trouble shooting it and still cannot get good parts. I tried the similar blue filament and it was okay, but still not great quality. Both are going in the trash and I am looking elsewhere.

The filament seems to work well for prints, but it likes to break off (as shown in picture) meaning that it is hard to do longer prints because it will almost certainly break. This filament is only good for small prints or if you check it frequently. I kept it stored in a vacuum sealed bag with those beads that absorb the moisture, but it still didn‘t help.

I dont know what happened with this batch of filament, the machine that rolled it must‘ve had a few too many before it showed up to work. The print quality is good but I have to monitor the spool as it is all tangled up.

reviews.标题: I wanted to love it. Might give it another shot.
reviews.评论: Order 5 Rolls of Overture black PLA when it was on sale for $10.99 per roll, dried it and threw in a couple different P1S machines and could get anything to print with it. Kind of disappointed everyone else has had really good things to say about overture in my 3D printing group of friends. I gave 3 stars because I only tried the one roll and it could have just been a bad roll, I threw in some Bambu basic black and the print come out flawless, so not the machines.

reviews.标题: Filament not rolled properly in the spool
reviews.评论: Filament is not rolled properly on the spool. It gets stuck while printer is pulling it. I have to keep re-feeding it during printing.

I am not a fan of this filament. I thought I would try it since it was less expensive but that was a mistake. I have an Ender 3 with upgrades. The black PLA filament I used kept breaking and skipping. I tried to print a 13 hour model 2 different times and I was lucky to get 20% and 30% respectively complete. I tried the same model using Hatchbox PLA and it did a fantastic job!

It‘s cheap, black, and prints fine for the most part. So why the low review stars?Dear god, does this filament like to break. This is the only filament I‘ve ever used that will consistently break if not used continuously. I‘ve had frequent breaking within the extruder itself, which clogged up the printer and required pretty thorough hotend cleaning on multiple occasions. On the bright side, any of the long chunks of broken filament were able to be donated to STEM outreach events using 3D pens, so they didn‘t entirely go to waste.
